title: RCraft
description: a realistic minecraft modpack by alirezafayeghi120
body:
This modpack is made for players who want to experience Minecraft as a living, breathing world!

With new biomes and custom structures, every adventure feels fresh and alive.   letting you see far-off mountains, valleys, and villages like never before.

From lush forests and foggy peaks to hidden settlements in nature, every corner of this pack is designed to make Minecraft feel more realistic, vibrant, and full of life.

🔹 Perfect for Survival and Creative gameplay

🔹 Great for YouTube content and cinematic experiences

🌿 Step into a world where Minecraft feels more real than ever before!
